DECLARATION OF KENNETH W. BOLINGER IN SUPPORT OF TRANSFERRING SMALL CLAIMS TO SUPERIOR COURT- LIMITED CIVIL JURISDICTION FILED. $1 FEES PAID.

SECOND CORRESPONDENCE WITH A COPY OF COMPLAINT TO SUP. CT. LIMITED JURISDICTION #176709 WITH ORDER FILED AND SENT TO COURT FOR ORDER.
